• Torre Atlântica: apartments measuring 133 m² (3 standard suites), 155 m² (3 garden suites), 182 m² (4 standard suites) and 204 m² (4 garden suites).
• Torre Mar: apartments measuring 133 m² (3 standard suites) and 155 m² (3 garden suites).
Unit distribution
• Torre Oceano — 24 apartments, all with 4 suites: 4 garden of 204 m² (1st floor, columns 01–04) + 20 standard apartments of 182 m² (2nd to 6th floor, columns 01–04).
• Torre Atlântica — 24 apartments: 2 garden with 3 suites of 155 m² (1st floor, columns 01–02), 2 garden with 4 suites of 204 m² (1st floor, columns 03–04), 10 standard with 3 suites of 133 m² (2nd–6th floor, columns 01–02) and 10 standard with 4 suites of 182 m² (2nd–6th floor, columns 03–04).
• Torre Mar — 20 apartments: 4 garden with 3 suites measuring 155 m² (2nd floor, columns 01–04) and 16 standard apartments with 3 suites measuring 133 m² (3rd–6th floor, columns 01–04). 1st floor is leisure, without apartments.
cyano.tipologia:
Product and configuration
• High standard residential apartment (Salvador Luxury Residence).
• Available configurations: 3 suites or 4 suites, with options for garden units on the 1st floor.
• Concept: "Live a memorable story" – luxury, sophistication and sea views at Rio Vermelho.
Structure, towers and distribution
• 3 independent towers: Torre Oceano, Torre Atlântica and Torre Mar.
• Torre Oceano: 6 floors with 24 apartments (all with 4 suites).
• Torre Atlântica: 6 floors with 24 apartments.
• Torre Mar: 6 floors with 20 apartments (1st floor dedicated to leisure).
• Distribution of spaces: apartments with 4 suites with 3 private spaces and apartments with 3 suites with 2 private spaces.
Other relevant information
• Signed concept: architecture and ambiance by Architects + Co, landscaping by Takeda Design.
• Visual identity: "Long live all the tones of Cyano" – reference to the tones of the sea and sky in Salvador.
